entry.title: Validation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I have a situation regarding validation. So we have multiple GL account and for all the GL's we use functional area. So now we want to restrict GL as per functional area.

For example, GL 2000100 should use only functional area 1 and 3. 
when i am creating the validation in GGB0 my validation is working for all functional areas. The validation i made is:

Prerequisite

Co. Code=xxxx and GL=xxxx

Check

Functional area =1

Message

please use correct functional area.

When i am using this validation and trying to post the entry the same validation is working for other functional areas however it should only work for functional area 1 and for rest functional area system should allow the entry to pass. So i am unable to understand that in Check i have maintained only functional area 1 then how come i am getting same error message when i am using functional area 2,3,4 and 5.

Please advise where I went wrong.

entry.title: Unable to print a billing document (AdobeForms) in VF02
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I  recently updated old smartforms for invoices and created new forms in ADOBEFORMS to comply with SAFT forms in Angola. However, in SAP transaction VF02, when trying to print a billing document with a downpayment equal to the due payment, an error message appears: 'Cannot print billing document 2023xxxxxxx; data for customer 26xxx is unreadable.' Despite the absence of relevant notes, how can this issue be resolved to successfully print the billing document

Please I need your help.

entry.title: Report S_ALR_87012405
entry.content:
Hello experts,

For report S_ALR_87012405 the bottom annex data is not displaying for March month but it is there for February month. Can anyone explain what could be the reason for the same.

entry.title: TAX Jurisdiction error for US company code.
entry.content:
Hi,

while posting an entry in US company code. we are getting the below error.

Error in external tax system:(404) not fount

Message no. FS861 

Tax jurisdiction CAZZ is Canadian code. and the company code is US.

How to overcome this issue. Please help. Thanks, in advance.

FIN Posting and Taxes SAP Tax Classification and Reporting

entry.title: How to become a FI and CO Consultant?
entry.content:
Prezados todos,

Meu nome é Jorge Marazzo e sou de São Paulo.

Estou aqui para reunir informações e colocar em prática meu plano de me tornar uma Consultoria SAP para FI e CO.

Tentei encontrar onde posso encontrar cursos/materiais e os passos para seguir em frente, mas não consegui. Meu principal objetivo é obter a certificação da SAP.

Alguém sabe onde eu poderia procurá-lo?

Desde já, obrigado!

Olá, pessoal!

Meu nome é Jorge Marazzo e sou de São Paulo.

Estou buscando informações a respeito de como posso me tornar um Consultor SAP para os módulos FI e CO.

Tentei encontrar cursos/ materiais e o passo a passo para meu objetivo principal que é conseguir a certificação, mas não tive muito sucesso.

Por favor, alguém sabe onde posso começar a trilhar o "caminho das pedras"?

Agradeço antecipadamente!

entry.title: Error while specifying intervals and posting rules in t code OAYR
entry.content:
Hi all , 

Iam getting an error message ac519 company code not defined while specifying intervals and posting rules 

Path : spro- img- fin acc- asset acco- integration with GL- post depreciation to GL- specify intervals and posting rules - execute  

I have checked Chart of depreciation is correctly assigned to company  code

Please any one help me out with this issue

entry.title: SAP Finance Reports Differences.
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

T-code S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 and S_ALR_87012284 turns out to be totally different figures，And only the result of S_ALR_87012284 is correct，the result of S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 are wrong. I am in ECC version.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Account Assignment Category for Third Party Sales
entry.content: What factors we need to consider while deciding the Account Assignment Category for Third-Party Schedule line Category CS in SAP?

entry.content: the GL account not going

entry.title: Production order costs analysis before settlement
entry.content:
Hello,

is there a T-Code to get the costs analysis before settlement of a settled production order?

Regards

Tony

entry.title: Define correct costing lot size (avoid lot size variance)
entry.content:
Hello,

I need your support, because I think that we use SAP system in the wrong way. The post refers to costing lot size, lot size variance and order planning.

For an exemplary product, we set 4 hours as setup time in the recipe and 30.000 ea as costing lot size in material master (costing 1). When we create the production plan, we split a run in several production orders that are processed one after the other. For example: PO 1 = 10.000 ea, PO 2 = 10.000 ea, PO 3 = 10.000 ea, run size = 30.000 ea. During production, we confirm 4 setup hours for PO 1 and 0 setup hours for PO 2 and 3.

When we check the cost analysis after period settlement, each PO has a target quantity of 4 hours for setup. Therefore, we receive a lot size variance for each PO.

For understanding, we need 4 hours to set up the machine for the product. A run can take several days which is why we split it into several POs. Otherwise we have to wait till the end of the run to release and ship the product. 

Question: What are we doing wrong or what do we need to change to avoid lot size variance?

Feel free to ask if you need further information for understanding.

Regards

Tony

entry.title: Budgeting System in SAP
entry.content:
Dear All,

as like the Tally ERP systems, I am curious to know if there is a budgeting process in SAP. Could anyone guide me on the steps required to configure budgeting department-wise?

I would like to be able to input values department-wise, whereby they cannot purchase or create a purchase requisition once the value exceeds the budget.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to retrive po in substitution during miro
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a requirement to change the recon account during MIRO based on material group. Now I'm trying to do it through substitution but I see that BSEG-EBELN does not get populated in MIRO. Is there another way to retrieve the material group in the substitution? Or is there a way to do the requirement other than substitution?

Regards,

Aziz

entry.title: issues VF02
entry.content: i am facing this error

entry.title: Issue with Depreciation Area Values in Assets
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We have encountered an issue with the modification of depreciation area values in our assets module, and we are seeking guidance/ideas/support on how to address it.

More specifically, whenever we modify values in depreciation area 01, it automatically impacts depreciation area 02. Similarly modifications in depreciation area 20 affect area 21 and so forth. However, for our IFRS reporting purposes, we require depreciation area 02 to maintain its own distinct values separate from those of area 01.

This issue has become particularly problematic following a recent merger, during which asset values were transferred in local currency and converted. Unfortunately, we neglected to transfer these values into euros, resulting in discrepancies between the original company's euro values and the exchange rates used during the conversion process.

We are seeking assistance in resolving this issue to ensure accurate reporting in accordance with IFRS standards. Could you please advise if there is a transaction type or alternative approach that would allow us to modify depreciation area values independently without impacting other areas?

Your prompt attention to this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: TCS calculating as per singular invoice value rather than Cummulative invoices
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition environment for India localization. We have maintained the TCS configs as per the SAP suggested but the calculation for TCS is only if a single invoice value crosses the threshold limit (in our case-50,00,000) and not considering all the previous invoices posted.

The configurations done by me are as follows:-

1. Maintained access sequence ZDU1 after creating new condition table for the same.

2. Assigned the same for the Condition type JTC1 :-

3. Further we have maintained a condition record for condition types JTCB and JTC1 :-

 We have further maintained all identification numbers:

  • IN3 - GSTIN
  • AADHAR - AADHAR NUMBER
  • PAN - PAN NUMBER

even after such configurations we have initially posted 3 invoices as follws

1. Amount:- Rs. 19,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

2. Amount:- Rs. 19,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

3. Amount:- Rs. 10,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

as the cumulative billing document posted amount to Rs. 48,00,000 and we have maintained a threshold limit of Rs. 50,00,000 we further posted a 4th billing document. we have maintained the TCS Threshold Fiscal Year wise.

4. Amount:- Rs. 10,00,000 (still did not calculate TCS)

 

 

Kindly guide if any other configurations are to be done. As this is very crucial for India Localization.

 

Thanks

entry.title: India - Backup Book of Accounts (MCA requirement) - KBA 3309423
entry.content:
Resolution referred to in KBA 3309423 re  
(1) Data Extraction     and
(2) Business Analytical Reports
is very generic and does not offer any solution.
What SAP objects & reports do constitute 'Book of Accounts' in line with Section 128 of the Companies Act 2013 resp Rule 3 of the Companies (Accounts) Rules, 2014? 
'... Amended Rule 3(5) requires companies to maintain the backup of the books of accounts and other relevant books and papers in an electronic mode on servers physically located in India on a daily basis (earlier periodic basis), even in cases where such backups are maintained at a place outside India. The amendment draws reference to maintaining backups on a daily basis ...'.
Anybody does have any suggestions and/or solutions implemented in their environment (SAP ERP hosted in Germany and backup/data extraction/reports ... required at our India locations as per above)?
Any suggestions are highly welcome!
Thanks in advance & Kind regards,
Hubert
